title: 3級 模擬テスト7 リスニング第1部 1
prompt:
対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 7-1]
audioText:
A: Did you enjoy the healthy meals in Seattle, Nancy?
B: Yes, but it was a bit crowded. Over 417 people were there.
A: I see. Would you go there again?

title: 3級 模擬テスト7 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Seattle planning to organize more events?
[Mock 7-1]
passage: Recently, healthy meals has become very popular in Seattle. Since 2016, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 417 more events related to healthy meals.
choices: Because no one joined the events.
Because they want to make money.
Because it helps build a strong community.
explanation: grade3-07-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 3級 模擬テスト7 読解 2

次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

[Mock 7-2]
passage: Recently, new technology has become very popular in Berlin. Since 2017, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 424 more events related to new technology.
explanation: grade3-07-reading-02: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。
